component.name: Wayfinder Aura
component.summary: Local-first voice dictation — speak, text appears at your cursor

description.p: Wayfinder Aura is a local-first voice dictation application for Linux. Press a hotkey, speak, and your words are typed wherever your cursor is. By default, transcription runs on your device with whisper.cpp — in local mode your voice never leaves your computer. Optional cloud transcription backends are available if you choose to enable them, and the app checks online for model updates (toggleable).

Free tier includes local whisper.cpp dictation, hotkeys, text injection, and the full settings UI. Wayfinder Aura Ultra is an optional one-time purchase (launch price $29.99; regular price $60) that unlocks GPU acceleration, larger models, longer recording sessions, advanced audio options, and other premium features. Ultra is sold on wayfindercollective.io (not through Flathub billing); enter a license key in Settings after purchase.

ul.li: Local-first & Private — transcribed on your device by default; optional cloud backends if you choose them
Hotkey Triggered — Press a key to start/stop recording
Wayland & X11 Support — Works on modern Linux desktops
System Tray Integration — Runs quietly in the background
Multiple Whisper Models — Choose speed vs accuracy (tiny → large)
Smart Cleanup — Optional local LLM polishes grammar and tone
Game Aware — Hotkeys pause automatically while a game is running
Configurable Typing Speed — Instant paste or simulated typing

description.p: Perfect for writing emails, documents, code comments, chat messages, or any situation where speaking is faster than typing.

screenshot.caption: Dictate into any app — hotkey recording with live waveform feedback
Private local processing — microphone and audio settings on free tier
Live recording status with reactive waveform while you speak
Tone-aware cleanup — Minimal, Professional, Casual, Dev, and more
Guided first run — calm three-step welcome tour

description.p: Tag CI hardening for AppImage smoke and release packaging

ul.li: Tolerate modern AppStream tags on older ubuntu-22.04 appstreamcli
glslc_exe + glslang-tools for AppImage native builds
Sandbox-friendly model download paths (no host home filesystem grants)
Clear free-tier vs Ultra pricing disclosure in store metadata
Stable storefront checkout alias for Ultra purchase
CI and packaging hardening for public Flatpak builds

description.p: First public release of Wayfinder Aura

ul.li: Press Super+F2 to dictate — your words appear at the cursor in any app
Local-first transcription with whisper.cpp; optional tone cleanup on-device
Works on Wayland and X11, including KDE and GNOME
Game-aware hotkeys pause while a GameMode game is running
Steam Deck workflow: bind a back button and dictate from Game Mode
System tray integration and configurable typing speeds
